task_description: Build the International Student Service System (ODYSSEY) web application - a full-stack Next.js 14 capstone project for University of Batangas with tRPC, Prisma, NextAuth.js, and shadcn/ui. Includes 7 modules: Auth/Dashboard, Inquiry System, Appointment Scheduling, Visa Tracking, Exchange Programs, Orientation Center, and AI Multilingual Assistant.

verification.summary: npm run build passes with 29 routes compiled. npx prisma generate and db push succeed. npx prisma db seed creates comprehensive demo data. ESLint passes with zero warnings. Two review passes completed - all high-priority issues resolved (security, performance, correctness).
